message:
test(ftui-extras): improve terminal/parser.rs test coverage for ANSI escape parsing edge cases (bd-3h9a2)

Add 67 new tests covering: DCS hook/put/unhook roundtrip, ESC sequence variants
(restore cursor, index, reverse index, full reset), individual SGR attributes
(dim, blink, reverse, hidden, strikethrough), all SGR reset codes (22-29),
all standard/bright FG/BG colors, extended color edge cases (truncated sequences,
unknown modes), CSI cursor/erase/mode commands, parser state recovery, empty input,
Default/Debug impls, SGR/DEC constant values, and full parse-then-SGR roundtrips.

All 92 parser tests pass. Clippy clean. Fmt clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
